dates.event: ITR Filing — Individuals, HUF, AOP, BOI (no tax audit required)
dates.lateFilingInterest: Section 234A: 1% per month or part thereof on unpaid tax
dates.extensionHistory: Historically extended in some years (COVID, portal issues). Check CBDT circulars for FY 2025-26 actual date.
dates.notes: This is the standard due date for non-audit cases. Extension notifications, if any, will supersede this date.

dates.event: ITR Filing — Entities requiring Tax Audit u/s 44AB
dates.notes: Applicable to businesses with turnover > ₹1 Crore (or ₹10 Crore with 95% digital transactions) and professionals with gross receipts > ₹50 lakh

dates.event: ITR Filing — International/Specified Domestic Transactions (Transfer Pricing)
dates.notes: Applicable to companies/entities with international transactions or specified domestic transactions above threshold
Can be filed if original return had any omission/wrong statement. Must be filed before completion of assessment, whichever is earlier. Note: Cannot be filed after assessment order.
If ITR not filed by July 31, 2026. Must be filed before assessment is completed or December 31, 2026 — whichever is earlier. Subject to late filing fee u/s 234F.

dates.deadlineLabel: March 31, 2028 (2 years from end of AY)
dates.additionalTax: 25% additional tax on unpaid tax (if filed within 12 months of AY end); 50% (if filed between 12-24 months)
dates.notes: Updated return allows taxpayers to correct under-reporting of income. Not available if assessment order passed, or for losses/refund increase. Requires payment of additional tax.
Must be filed before ITR filing. Earlier of September 30, 2026 or date of ITR filing.
Applicable to companies subject to MAT; LLPs/firms subject to AMT

advanceTax.label: Advance Tax Payment Deadlines (FY 2025-26)
advanceTax.applicability: Applies if estimated tax liability for the year exceeds ₹10,000 after TDS credit

dates.notes: At least 15% of estimated annual tax liability must be paid by June 15, 2025
Cumulative advance tax paid by September 15 must be at least 45% of estimated liability
Cumulative advance tax paid by December 15 must be at least 75% of estimated liability
100% of estimated tax liability (net of TDS) by March 15, 2026. Presumptive income taxpayers (44AD/44ADA) pay 100% in single installment by March 15.

presumptiveTaxpayers.note: Taxpayers under Section 44AD or 44ADA (presumptive income) may pay entire advance tax in one installment by March 15, 2026. Section 234C interest for earlier installments does not apply to them.

dates.event: Form 16 (TDS Certificate for Salary) issuance to employees
dates.notes: Employer must issue Form 16 (Part A + Part B) to all employees by June 15, 2026

dates.deadlineNote: Within 15 days from due date of TDS return for each quarter
Within 30 days from date of filing the ITR
dates.legalReference: CBDT Notification No. 5/2023 (reduced from 120 days to 30 days)
consequences: If not verified within 30 days, ITR is treated as invalid (as if not filed)
Late verification is possible but ITR will be treated as filed on the date of verification (not original filing date)
Interest u/s 234A and fee u/s 234F may apply from actual filing date

dates.event: Issue of notice for scrutiny assessment u/s 143(2)
dates.deadlineNote: Within 6 months from end of AY (i.e., by September 30, 2027 for AY 2026-27)
12 months from end of AY (i.e., by March 31, 2028 for AY 2026-27)

dates.event: Issue of notice for reassessment u/s 148
dates.deadlineNote: 3 years from end of AY for income escaped ≤ ₹50L; 10 years for income escaped > ₹50L (with PCIT/CIT approval)
Within 4 years from end of FY in which order was passed

gst.label: Key GST Dates (Cross-reference for business filers)
gst.note: GST compliance is separate from income tax, but relevant for ITR-3/4 filers to cross-reference turnover

dates.notes: GST turnover in GSTR-9 should reconcile with ITR turnover

section234A.name: Interest for late filing of return
section234A.period: From due date of filing to date of actual filing
section234A.base: Tax payable after allowing TDS, advance tax, and self-assessment tax
section234A.note: No interest if no tax is due

section234B.name: Interest for default in advance tax payment
section234B.period: From April 1 of the AY to date of assessment
section234B.base: Tax payable minus advance tax paid
section234B.applicability: If advance tax paid < 90% of assessed tax

section234C.name: Interest for deferment of advance tax
section234C.period: 3 months each for June 15, September 15, December 15 installments; 1 month for March 15
section234C.applicability: If advance tax paid in each installment < required percentage

section234F.name: Fee for default in furnishing return of income

rates.condition: Total income > ₹5 lakh and return filed after due date
Total income ≤ ₹5 lakh and return filed after due date
Total income below basic exemption limit
